lessonHeader.title: Grammar
lessonHeader.titleTranslation: Past perfect simple, past perfect continuous
lessonHeader.titleTranslation_ru: Past perfect simple, past perfect continuous

cells: Actions and states before a moment in the past

_I'd **finished** my homework a few minutes before the lesson started._
_Mrs Cross **had been** a teacher for twenty years before she became a head teacher._
cells_uz: O'tmishdagi ma'lum bir paytdan oldingi harakatlar va holatlar

_Dars boshlanishidan bir necha daqiqa oldin men uy vazifamni **tugatib bo'lgan edim**._
_Missis Kross maktab direktori bo'lishidan oldin yigirma yil o'qituvchi **bo'lib ishlagan edi**._
cells_ru: Действия и состояния до определённого момента в прошлом

_Я **закончил** домашнее задание за несколько минут до начала урока._
_Миссис Кросс **проработала** учителем двадцать лет, прежде чем стала директором._

cells: Finished actions and states where the important thing is the result at a moment in the past
_We were happy because we'd all **done** our homework._
cells_uz: O'tmishdagi ma'lum bir paytda natija muhim bo'lgan tugallangan harakatlar
_Biz xursand edik, chunki hammamiz uy vazifasini **bajarib bo'lgan edik**._
cells_ru: Завершённые действия, где важен результат в определённый момент в прошлом
_Мы были рады, потому что все **сделали** домашнее задание._

tip.label: Helpful hints
tip.translation: Past Perfect Simple ko'pincha quyidagi so'z va iboralar bilan ishlatiladi:
tip.translation_ru: Past Perfect Simple часто используется со следующими словами и фразами:
tip.translationBottom:
Misollar:
• _by_ — _I'd finished my homework **by** eight o'clock._
• _by the time_ — _**By the time** I got to class, the lesson had started._
• _before_ — _The teacher had checked the answers **before** the lesson._
• _after_ — _I left **after** I'd finished the test._
• _just_ — _Simon had **just** finished the test when the bell rang._
• _when_ — _I left **when** I'd finished the test._
tip.translationBottom_ru:
Примеры:
• _by_ — _I'd finished my homework **by** eight o'clock._
• _by the time_ — _**By the time** I got to class, the lesson had started._
• _before_ — _The teacher had checked the answers **before** the lesson._
• _after_ — _I left **after** I'd finished the test._
• _just_ — _Simon had **just** finished the test when the bell rang._
• _when_ — _I left **when** I'd finished the test._

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation:
• Past Simple yoki Past Perfect ishlatish gapning ma'nosini o'zgartirishi mumkin.
✓ _The lesson **started** when I arrived._ (= Men keldim va keyin dars boshlandi.)
✓ _The lesson **had started** when I arrived._ (= Dars boshlangan edi, keyin men keldim.)

• Ba'zi fe'llar noto'g'ri o'tgan zamon sifatdoshlariga ega. 182-sahifaga qarang.
tip.translation_ru:
• Использование Past Simple или Past Perfect может изменить смысл предложения.
✓ _The lesson **started** when I arrived._ (= Я пришёл, и затем урок начался.)
✓ _The lesson **had started** when I arrived._ (= Урок уже начался, когда я пришёл.)

• Некоторые глаголы имеют неправильные формы причастий прошедшего времени. См. стр. 182.

cells: Actions continuing up to, or stopping just before, a moment in the past

_We'd **been doing** grammar exercises for over an hour, so we were really bored!_
_They had a break because they'd **been working** so hard._
cells_uz: O'tmishdagi ma'lum bir paytgacha davom etgan yoki undan sal oldin to'xtagan harakatlar

_Biz bir soatdan ortiq grammatika mashqlari bilan **shug'ullanib kelgan edik**, shuning uchun juda zerikib ketgan edik!_
_Ular juda qattiq **ishlagan bo'lganliklari** uchun dam olishdi._
cells_ru: Действия, продолжавшиеся до определённого момента в прошлом или прекратившиеся незадолго до него

_Мы **делали** грамматические упражнения уже больше часа, поэтому нам было очень скучно!_
_Они сделали перерыв, потому что так усердно **работали**._

tip.label: Helpful hints
tip.translation: Past Perfect Continuous ko'pincha quyidagi so'z va iboralar bilan ishlatiladi:
tip.translation_ru: Past Perfect Continuous часто используется со следующими словами и фразами:
tip.translationBottom:
Misollar:
• _for_ — _Tony had been studying **for** hours, so he had a headache._
• _since_ — _She'd been hoping to win the competition **since** the summer._
• _before_ — _We'd been talking about the Internet **before** the lesson started._
• _all day/night/etc_ — _I'd been studying **all day**._
tip.translationBottom_ru:
Примеры:
• _for_ — _Tony had been studying **for** hours, so he had a headache._
• _since_ — _She'd been hoping to win the competition **since** the summer._
• _before_ — _We'd been talking about the Internet **before** the lesson started._
• _all day/night/etc_ — _I'd been studying **all day**._

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation:
• Past Perfect Simple ko'pincha harakatning **natijasini** ta'kidlaydi:
✓ _She'd **written** an article for the school newspaper._ (= U yozib bo'ldi.)

• Past Perfect Continuous ko'pincha harakatning **o'zini** va unga sarflangan **vaqtni** ta'kidlaydi:
✓ _She'd **been writing** an article for the newspaper._ (= U boshlagan, lekin hali tugatmagan edi.)
tip.translation_ru:
• Past Perfect Simple часто подчёркивает **результат** действия:
✓ _She'd **written** an article for the school newspaper._ (= Она закончила.)

• Past Perfect Continuous часто подчёркивает само **действие** и **время**, потраченное на него:
✓ _She'd **been writing** an article for the newspaper._ (= Она начала, но ещё не закончила.)
